name: Revolut
philosophy: | Revolut's marketing surfaces pair a stark black canvas with the brand's cobalt-violet (`#494fdf`) and a wide accent palette of deep, fully-saturated product colours — teal, light-blue, deep pink, light-green, warning orange.
trademark_signals: Two-mode canvas system — (true black) for storytelling, (white) for browsing — switched in full-bleed bands
Display typography is Aeonik Pro 500 at sizes 20–136px with tight lineHeight: 1.0 and large negative letter-spacing on display sizes
Eight saturated accent colours live inside product mockups and illustrations only, never as button surfaces
All buttons are pill-shaped ; content cards use (20px); inputs and small chips use (12px)
ai_slop_avoided: use accent colours (, etc.) as button surfaces. They live inside illustrations only
use a near-black canvas. The brand is #000000, not #0a0a0a
pair white text with cobalt violet inside body content — is for the featured plan card surface, not large prose
